flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Suncoast Technical College fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (36.9% → 26.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Suncoast Technical College fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Suncoast Technical College rose 48% between 2006 and 2009 (57.8% → 85.5%).
